summary: All spec-102 ACs satisfied in the merged code. R1: precomplete.go deleted (matchMindspecComplete/segmentInvokesComplete/completeBeadID/runPreComplete all gone — grep clean across internal/+cmd/); pre-complete dispatch arm removed (dispatch.go); 'pre-complete' removed from hook.go Names (TestNames_Sorted PASS); ScenarioPanelGateBlocksPrematureComplete + its scenario_panel_gate.go/_test.go deleted and de-registered from scenario.go (grep clean, vet clean); setup retires the PreToolUse pre-complete entry via removeStaleMindspecEntries with removed-by-omission + idempotent-removal witnesses (TestSetup|TestClaude PASS, incl. TestWantedHooks_NoPreCompletePreToolUse); ADR-0037 carries a dated 2026-06-17 spec-102 amendment recording the retirement. In-binary gate preserved: internal/complete does NOT import internal/hook; 8 top-level TestPanelGate_* PASS (SubThreshold_Blocks, git-merge fence, recovery line, BlockNeverNamesSkipVar, SharedDecisionPin); TestPanelGateDecision (panel) PASS. R2: extractMentionedPaths + call site + empty-expectations term + total denominator + touchedPaths/expectedPaths match block all removed as a unit (analyzer.go grep clean); PlanFidelity is commands-only and internally consistent (filepath import still used); RED->GREEN witness TestAnalyzer_PlanFidelity_PathTermRetired asserts exactly 0.0 (was 0.5 under old path-aware path) — TestAnalyzer_PlanFidelity PASS. go build ./... green; go vet hook/setup/harness/cmd clean. Non-blocking out-of-scope nit: internal/instruct/panelstate.go:180 still says 'the pre-complete hook ENFORCES' (pre-existing prose from spec 093, not touched by 102, not in internal/hook|harness, no AC impact) — cosmetic follow-up only.
